description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js CI Windows Platform that runs on push and pull request events. Use a job matrix to test across multiple Node.js versions (18.x, 20.x, 22.x), architectures (x64, x86), and Windows OS versions (2019, 2022) with Python 3.11. For each job, harden the runner, check out the code, set up Python and Node.js, verify Node.js installation, install dependencies with npm, and run npm tests with optional environment variables for experimental API versions.
